hooks.command: for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) npx eslint --fix "$f" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; done

hooks.prompt: Check if source code was modified and verified. 1) Were .ts or .tsx files in src/ or tests/ edited using Write or Edit tools? (Ignore .claude/, docs/, *.md, *.json files) 2) If yes, were verification commands (vitest or tsc) run AFTER the last source edit? If source files were modified but NO verification was run after, return ok:false with reason 'Source code was modified but verification was not run. Please run: npx tsc --noEmit && npx vitest run'. If no source files were modified, or verification was already run, return ok:true.

hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code task completed" with title "Project" sound name "Glass"'
